events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes a harness impact indicator deployed (webbing tag visible). This means the harness has been subjected to an impact load and should be removed from service immediately.

  "findings": [
    "Full-body harness impact indicator deployed — webbing tag exposed, indicating the harness has arrested a fall or been impact-loaded",
    "Impact-loaded harness must be permanently removed from service; cannot be returned to use without manufacturer recertification"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately remove the harness from service and tag it out",
    "Inspect associated lanyard/SRL, anchor, and connectors for impact damage",
    "Document the fall event and investigate root cause",
    "Replace harness with a compliant, inspected unit before resuming work at height"
  ],
  "rationale": "A deployed impact indicator confirms the harness has experienced fall-arrest loading. Under OSHA 1910.140 and 1926 Subpart M, personal fall arrest equipment subjected to impact must be removed from service and not reused until determined serviceable by a competent person or manufacturer. The harness is defective for continued use.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926 Subpart M",
    "OSHA 1910.140"
  ]
